GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub GraphQL token. Create one from GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens.

VITE_GITHUB_USERNAME.description: GitHub username shown in the profile, activity feed, and contribution graph.

VITE_SITE_AUTHOR.description: Name shown in the footer copyright notice.

VITE_SITE_KEYWORDS.description: Comma-separated keywords for the page metadata.

VITE_SITE_ICP.description: ICP filing number. Leave empty when it does not apply.

VITE_SOCIAL_EMAIL.description: Email address used for the Email social link.

VITE_SOCIAL_TWITTER.description: Twitter username without @. Leave empty to hide the link.

VITE_SOCIAL_TELEGRAM.description: Telegram username without @. Leave empty to hide the link.

VITE_SOCIAL_QQ.description: QQ number. Leave empty to hide the link.

VITE_SOCIAL_BILIBILI.description: Bilibili user ID. Leave empty to hide the link.

scripts.build: vue-tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p workers/tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.build:cloudflare: vue-tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p workers/tsconfig.json && vite build --mode cloudflare
